code:
%%{Groupware_ChatRoom}}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
    [Groupware_IssueTracker] --> Idle: App Start
    
    Idle --> Recording: Start Recording
    Recording --> Paused: Pause
    Paused --> Recording: Resume
    Recording --> Saving: Stop Recording
    Paused --> Saving: Stop Recording
    Saving --> Idle: Save Complete
    
    Idle --> Loading: Load Session
    Loading --> Ready: Session Loaded
    Ready --> Playing: Play
    Playing --> Paused2: Pause
    Paused2 --> Playing: Resume
    Playing --> Ready: Stop/Complete
    Ready --> Idle: Close Session
    
    state Recording {Groupware_WikiPage] --> Capturing
        Capturing --> Capturing: Packet Received
        Capturing --> BufferFull: Buffer Limit
        BufferFull --> Flushing: Auto-flush
        Flushing --> Capturing: Flush Complete
    }
    
    state Playing {Groupware_KanbanBoard] --> Emitting
        Emitting --> Waiting: Packet Emitted
        Waiting --> Emitting: Delay Complete
        Emitting --> [Groupware_IssueTracker]: Last Packet
    }
    
    note right of Recording
        Captures:
        - Timestamp
        - Direction
        - Raw hex
        - Decoded JSON
        - Action name
    end note
    
    note right of Playing
        Replay Options:
        - Speed: 0.5x - 4x
        - Seek to position
        - Step forward/back
        - Filter by action
    end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个网络抓包分析工具的状态图，核心场景是录制和回放。用户从IssueTracker启动后，先进入Idle状态，然后可以开始录制。
明白，Idle作为起始状态。录制过程中有暂停和恢复的需求吗？还有停止录制后的数据怎么处理？
对，Recording和Paused之间要双向切换，Resume恢复录制。停止录制后进入Saving状态，保存完成后回到Idle。另外Paused状态下也可以直接Stop Recording进入Saving。
好的，主状态流转已经画好。现在处理录制子状态——我打算用Recording作为复合状态，内部从WikiPage开始，进入Capturing持续抓包。
Capturing有个细节：收到Packet时自循环，但Buffer满了要触发Auto-flush进入Flushing状态，刷新完再回到Capturing。另外需要在Recording旁边加个注释说明捕获的字段。
注释已加，包含Timestamp、Direction、Raw hex、Decoded JSON和Action name。现在处理回放部分——Idle可以Load Session进入Loading，加载完成后到Ready状态。
Ready之后Play进入Playing，Playing也能Pause到Paused2再Resume回来。播放完或者主动Stop就回到Ready，Close Session返回Idle。Playing也要做成复合状态。
Playing内部从KanbanBoard开始Emitting，发完Packet进入Waiting延迟，延迟结束继续Emitting。最后一个Packet直接回到IssueTracker。右侧加上Replay Options注释。
检查一遍：录制子状态、回放子状态、所有流转和注释都齐了。复合状态嵌套关系正确，可以定稿了。
